strengths: 13+ years full-stack experience across TypeScript, Node.js, and React matching the primary stack
Hands-on AI-agent infrastructure work including MCP code generators at current role
Strong engineering craftsmanship background: TDD, CI/CD, trunk-based development, and testing advocacy
concerns: No explicit Nest.js or Vitest experience mentioned in the resume
Limited recent Kotlin/Java exposure; secondary backend stack not demonstrated
Cloud experience narrow (AWS CDK only); no clear GCP/Azure or Kubernetes production depth beyond self-hosted

key_factors.factor: AI agent and MCP tooling experience

response.justification: The candidate is a seasoned full-stack engineer with well over the required 6 years, strong command of TypeScript, Node.js, and React, and directly relevant AI-agent and MCP tooling experience that aligns with internal automation goals. Engineering craftsmanship, testing culture, and architectural breadth across web, mobile, and embedded systems are clear strengths. Gaps include no explicit Nest.js or Vitest mention and limited recent Kotlin/Java or broad cloud platform exposure, though the foundational skills suggest these are learnable adjacencies.
